speaker: KING
text: I have sent to seek him and to find the body.

speaker: KING
text: How dangerous is it that this man goes loose!

speaker: KING
text: Yet must not we put the strong law on him.

speaker: KING
text: He’s loved of the distracted multitude,

speaker: KING
text: Who like not in their judgment, but their eyes;

speaker: KING
text: And, where ’tis so, th’ offender’s scourge is weighed,

speaker: KING
text: But never the offense. To bear all smooth and even,

speaker: KING
text: This sudden sending him away must seem

speaker: KING
text: Deliberate pause. Diseases desperate grown

speaker: KING
text: By desperate appliance are relieved

speaker: KING
text: Or not at all.

speaker: KING
text: How now, what hath befallen?

speaker: ROSENCRANTZ
text: Where the dead body is bestowed, my lord,

speaker: ROSENCRANTZ
text: We cannot get from him.

speaker: KING
text: But where is he?

speaker: ROSENCRANTZ
text: Without, my lord; guarded, to know your pleasure.

speaker: KING
text: Bring him before us.

speaker: ROSENCRANTZ
text: Ho! Bring in the lord.

speaker: KING
text: Now, Hamlet, where’s Polonius?

speaker: HAMLET
text: At supper.

speaker: KING
text: At supper where?

speaker: HAMLET
text: Not where he eats, but where he is eaten. A

speaker: HAMLET
text: certain convocation of politic worms are e’en at

speaker: HAMLET
text: him. Your worm is your only emperor for diet. We

speaker: HAMLET
text: fat all creatures else to fat us, and we fat ourselves

speaker: HAMLET
text: for maggots. Your fat king and your lean beggar is

speaker: HAMLET
text: but variable service—two dishes but to one table.

speaker: HAMLET
text: That’s the end.

speaker: KING
text: Alas, alas!

speaker: HAMLET
text: A man may fish with the worm that hath eat

speaker: HAMLET
text: of a king and eat of the fish that hath fed of that

speaker: HAMLET
text: worm.

speaker: KING
text: What dost thou mean by this?

speaker: HAMLET
text: Nothing but to show you how a king may go a

speaker: HAMLET
text: progress through the guts of a beggar.

speaker: KING
text: Where is Polonius?

speaker: HAMLET
text: In heaven. Send thither to see. If your messenger

speaker: HAMLET
text: find him not there, seek him i’ th’ other

speaker: HAMLET
text: place yourself. But if, indeed, you find him not

speaker: HAMLET
text: within this month, you shall nose him as you go up

speaker: HAMLET
text: the stairs into the lobby.

speaker: KING
text: Go, seek him there.

speaker: HAMLET
text: He will stay till you come.

speaker: KING
text: Hamlet, this deed, for thine especial safety

speaker: KING
text: (Which we do tender, as we dearly grieve

speaker: KING
text: For that which thou hast done) must send thee hence

speaker: KING
text: With fiery quickness. Therefore prepare thyself.

speaker: KING
text: The bark is ready, and the wind at help,

speaker: KING
text: Th’ associates tend, and everything is bent

speaker: KING
text: For England.

speaker: HAMLET
text: For England?

speaker: KING
text: Ay, Hamlet.

speaker: HAMLET
text: Good.

speaker: KING
text: So is it, if thou knew’st our purposes.

speaker: HAMLET
text: I see a cherub that sees them. But come, for England.

speaker: HAMLET
text: Farewell, dear mother.

speaker: KING
text: Thy loving father, Hamlet.

speaker: HAMLET
text: My mother. Father and mother is man and wife,

speaker: HAMLET
text: Man and wife is one flesh, and so, my mother.—

speaker: HAMLET
text: Come, for England.

speaker: KING
text: Follow him at foot; tempt him with speed aboard.

speaker: KING
text: Delay it not. I’ll have him hence tonight.

speaker: KING
text: Away, for everything is sealed and done

speaker: KING
text: That else leans on th’ affair. Pray you, make haste.

speaker: KING
text: And England, if my love thou hold’st at aught

speaker: KING
text: (As my great power thereof may give thee sense,

speaker: KING
text: Since yet thy cicatrice looks raw and red

speaker: KING
text: After the Danish sword, and thy free awe

speaker: KING
text: Pays homage to us), thou mayst not coldly set

speaker: KING
text: Our sovereign process, which imports at full,

speaker: KING
text: By letters congruing to that effect,

speaker: KING
text: The present death of Hamlet. Do it, England,

speaker: KING
text: For like the hectic in my blood he rages,

speaker: KING
text: And thou must cure me. Till I know ’tis done,

speaker: KING
text: Howe’er my haps, my joys will ne’er begin.
